You can manage your payment details at any time by navigating to Account Settings → Billing; if you continue to see an error, please try clearing your browser cache or using an incognito window. Please note that our system automatically retries failed payments up to three times over a seven-day period before an account is suspended, so we will attempt to process your payment again shortly. Once your payment method is successfully updated, you will be able to download your tax invoice directly from the Billing History section in your account settings. If you need further assistance, please let us know.

Please note that while you can manage your payment methods and download past tax invoices directly under Account Settings → Billing History, our system applies VAT based on the registered country of residence on your account. To update your company's VAT number for future invoices, please reply to this email with your updated tax details, and our billing team will manually update your profile. Once updated, your future invoices will reflect this information correctly.

customer_msg: I have been using your platform for six months, but the recent price hike makes it difficult to justify the cost for my small team. We aren't using enough of the advanced features to warrant this new monthly rate. Please let me know how to proceed with cancelling my subscription.
reply_text: Hi there, thank you for reaching out and sharing your feedback regarding our recent pricing. I understand that the new rates are challenging for a small team, especially when you aren't utilizing all of our advanced features. Before you proceed with cancellation, I would like to escalate your account to our Account Management team, as they have the authority to discuss custom pricing options that may better fit your needs. Alternatively, we offer a 30% discount for the next three months or the option to downgrade your plan without penalty. If you would prefer to discuss your specific product concerns, I am also happy to book a free 30-minute success check-in call with you. If you still wish to move forward with cancellation, you can do so at any time via Account Settings → Subscription → Cancel Plan.
